scope: water-only bench validation before fertilizer or chemical tests
required_equipment: two graduated catch cups or measuring cylinders
preconditions: Use water only; no fertilizer or chemical concentrate.
Pixhawk/Raspberry Pi logic power is separate from pump/valve actuator rail.
Pump and valves are fused and flyback-protected.
E-stop physically cuts actuator power independent of software.
Low liquid interlock and pressure interlock or gauge are wired or simulated before spray tests.
Tank outlet filter is installed before pump inlet.

tests.title: Dry wiring inspection with actuator power off
tests.method: Inspect polarity, fuses, grounds, driver inputs, flyback protection, valve labels, and hose clamps before applying actuator power.
tests.acceptance: No loose conductors, no direct Pixhawk-to-load wiring, all actuator loads fused, pump/valves default off.

tests.title: Emergency stop cuts actuator rail
tests.method: Enable actuator supply with pump/valves commanded off, press E-stop, then command pump/valves on from controller or test harness.
tests.acceptance: Pump and valves remain off while E-stop is latched; reset requires manual operator action.

tests.title: Prime and leak check
tests.method: Fill tank with clean water, open safe drain/return path, run pump in short pulses below 40 PSI, inspect all fittings.
tests.acceptance: No visible leaks, no hose movement, no pump dry-run, pressure rises smoothly.

tests.title: Pressure low/high trip behavior
tests.method: Verify low pressure below 15 PSI and high pressure above 70 PSI trigger pump/valve off state using sensor/gauge or adjustable bypass.
tests.acceptance: Fault forces pump off and both valves closed; automatic resume is disabled.

tests.title: Low-liquid interlock
tests.method: Simulate low-liquid switch or reduce water to threshold while pump command is enabled.
tests.acceptance: Pump and valves shut off; operator reset is required after refill.

tests.title: Left/right zone isolation
tests.method: At 40 PSI, command LEFT, RIGHT, BOTH, and OFF states while observing nozzle output.
tests.acceptance: LEFT sprays only left nozzle; RIGHT sprays only right nozzle; BOTH sprays both; OFF sprays none.

tests.title: Catch-cup flow sanity check
tests.method: At 40 PSI, collect each nozzle output for 60 seconds into separate measuring cups.
tests.acceptance: Each 11002-class nozzle measures 0.60-0.90 L/min and left/right difference is <=20%.

tests.title: Fault safe output state
tests.method: During LEFT or BOTH spray, trigger E-stop, low-liquid, and pressure fault one at a time.
tests.acceptance: Every fault state results in pump off, left valve closed, right valve closed, and operator review required.

pass_rule: All tests must be PASS in bench-test-log.template.json before any fertilizer or chemical test.
forbidden: testing with fertilizer or pesticide before water-only PASS
bypassing E-stop or low-liquid interlock to complete a test
standing in spray fan during pressure or catch-cup tests
